summary: **Status: PROVISIONAL first draft** (designer-1, 2026-07-11). This document synthesises two divergent architecture proposals (WM-1 "world-memory-layer" and KOTC "activation/decode/train compiler") against the grounding dossier (kernel inventory, sparq-inference survey, LLM-integration prior art, RULES-1 skeleton). It is an input to an independent GPT-5.6 proposal round and the GPT-5.6 review gate. **No feasibility conclusion is stated or implied anywhere in this document; verdicts belong to the
title: WMRE-1 — World-Model + Rules-Engine Architecture, and the RULES-1 Minimal Viable Experiment
